category_sources: source_facts.description: Manage complex enterprise Kubernetes environments as code; official README says kubecfg manages Kubernetes resources as code.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official repository name are kubecfg.
docs_sources: Official README points to https://kubecfg.github.io/kubecfg/ as documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kubecfg/kubecfg, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Kubernetes resources as code; README quickstart uses Jsonnet examples; source_facts.executables lists kubecfg.
